Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

Class Lib

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.Lib
public final class Lib extends Object
This is a collection of static constants and methods that are used often in relation to the sequent prover.

Note that they are public but not published and are subject to change. They are to be used at one own's risk. Making referencs to the static functions inside it is highly discouraged since their implementation may change without notice, leaving your code in an uncompilable state.

This does not however prevent you from having your own local copies of the functions that you need, assuming that they do the intended job.

Since:
1.0

    • breakPossibleConjunct

      public static Set<Predicate> breakPossibleConjunct(Predicate P)
      Returns a set of conjuncts of P when it is a conjunction, otherwise a singleton set containing P. The returned set is mutable.
      Parameters:
      P - a predicate
      Returns:
      a mutable set of conjuncts of the given predicate

    • getBoundIdents

    • getBoundPredicate

      public static Predicate getBoundPredicate(Predicate P)

    • typeCheckClosed

      public static boolean typeCheckClosed(Formula<?> formula, ITypeEnvironment typEnv)
      Type checks a formula and returns true iff no new type information was inferred from this type check (i.e. the formula contains only free identifiers present in the type environment provided).
      Parameters:
      formula - The formula to type check
      typEnv - The type environment to use for this check
      Returns:
      true iff the type check was successful and no new type information was inferred from this type check

    • isWellTypedInstantiation

      public static boolean isWellTypedInstantiation(Expression e, Type expT, ITypeEnvironment te)

    • typeCheckClosed

      private static boolean typeCheckClosed(ITypeCheckResult tcr)

    • isFunApp

      public static boolean isFunApp(Formula<?> formula)

    • isOvr

      public static boolean isOvr(Expression expression)
      Check if an expression is a function overriding or not

      Parameters:
      expression - any expression
      Returns:
      true if the expression is a function overriding (associative expression with tag OVR), return false otherwise.

    • isPFun

      public static boolean isPFun(Expression expression)
      Check if an expression is a partial function

      Parameters:
      expression - any expression
      Returns:
      true iff the expression is a partial function (binary expression with tag PFUN)

    • isFun

      public static boolean isFun(Expression expression)
      Check if an expression is a functional binary expression

      Parameters:
      expression - any expression
      Returns:
      true iff the expression is a functional expression (binary expression with tag PFUN or TFUN or PINJ or TINJ or PSUR or TSUR or TBIJ)

    • isRel

      public static boolean isRel(Expression expression)
      Check if an expression is a relational binary expression

      Parameters:
      expression - any expression
      Returns:
      true iff the expression is a functional expression (binary expression with tag REL or TREL or SREL or TREL)
      Since:
      2.0

    • getRight

      public static Expression getRight(Expression expr)
      Returns the right hand side of a binary expression.
      Parameters:
      expr - the given binary expression.
      Returns:
      the right hand side of the given binary expression, or null in case the given expression is not a binary expression.

    • getLeft

      public static Expression getLeft(Expression expr)
      Returns the left hand side of a binary expression.
      Parameters:
      expr - the given binary expression.
      Returns:
      the left hand side of the given binary expression, or null in case the given expression is not a binary expression.

    • isSetExtension

      public static boolean isSetExtension(Expression expression)

    • isInter

      public static boolean isInter(Expression expression)
      Test if the formula is a set intersection "S ∩ ... ∩ T".

      Parameters:
      expression - any expression
      Returns:
      true if the given expression is a set intersection. Return false otherwise.

    • isUnion

      public static boolean isUnion(Expression expression)
      Test if the formula is a set union "S ∪ ... ∪ T".

      Parameters:
      expression - any expression
      Returns:
      true if the given expression is a set union. Return false otherwise.

      public static boolean isConv(Expression expression)

    • isMapping

      public static boolean isMapping(Formula<?> formula)
      Test if the formula is a mapping "a ↦ b".

      Parameters:
      formula - any formula
      Returns:
      true if the input formula is a mapping. Return false otherwise.

    • isSingletonSet

      public static boolean isSingletonSet(Expression expression)
      Test if the formula is a singleton set "{E}".

      Parameters:
      expression - any expression
      Returns:
      true if the given expression is a singleton set. Return false otherwise.

    • isDirectProduct

      public static boolean isDirectProduct(Formula<?> formula)
      Test if the formula is a direct product "p ⊗ q".

      Parameters:
      formula - any formula
      Returns:
      true if the input formula is a direct product. Return false otherwise.

    • isParallelProduct

      public static boolean isParallelProduct(Formula<?> formula)
      Test if the formula is a parallel product "p ∥ q".

      Parameters:
      formula - any formula
      Returns:
      true if the input formula is a parallel product. Return false otherwise.

    • isFinite

      public static boolean isFinite(Formula<?> formula)
      Test if the formula is a finiteness "finite(S)".

      Parameters:
      formula - any formula
      Returns:
      true if the input formula is a finiteness. Return false otherwise.

    • isRelation

      public static boolean isRelation(Formula<?> formula)
      Test if the formula is a relation "r" (i.e. formula of type ℙ(S × T) for some S and T

      Parameters:
      formula - any formula
      Returns:
      true if the input formula is a relation. Return false otherwise.

    • isSetOfRelation

      public static boolean isSetOfRelation(Formula<?> formula)
      Test if the formula is a set of all relation "S ↔ T" for some S and T

      Parameters:
      formula - any formula
      Returns:
      true if the input formula is a set of all relations. Return false otherwise.

    • isRan

      public static boolean isRan(Formula<?> formula)
      Test if the formula is the range of a relation "ran(r)"

      Parameters:
      formula - any formula
      Returns:
      true if the input formula is the range of a relation. Return false otherwise.

    • isDom

      public static boolean isDom(Formula<?> formula)
      Test if the formula is the domain of a relation "dom(r)"

      Parameters:
      formula - any formula
      Returns:
      true if the input formula is the domain of a relation. Return false otherwise.

    • isSetOfPartialFunction

      public static boolean isSetOfPartialFunction(Formula<?> formula)
      Test if the formula is a set of all partial functions "S ⇸ T" for some S and T

      Parameters:
      formula - any formula
      Returns:
      true if the input formula is a set of all partial functions. Return false otherwise.

    • isBoundIdentifier

      public static boolean isBoundIdentifier(Formula<?> formula)
      Test if the formula is a bound identifier

      Parameters:
      formula - any formula
      Returns:
      true if the input formula is bound identifier. Return false otherwise.

    • isSetOfIntegers

      public static boolean isSetOfIntegers(Formula<?> formula)
      Test if the formula is a bound identifier

      Parameters:
      formula - any formula
      Returns:
      true if the input formula is bound identifier. Return false otherwise.

    • isCardinality

      public static boolean isCardinality(Formula<?> formula)
      Test if the formula is a cardinality expression (card(S))

      Parameters:
      formula - any formula
      Returns:
      true if the input formula is a cardinality expression. Return false otherwise.

    • getRangeType

      public static Type getRangeType(Expression r)
      Return the range type of a relation input. Return null if the input is not a relation, i.e. of type POW(S x T) for some sets S and T.
      Parameters:
      r - an relation expression.
      Returns:
      the type of the range of the input relation or null.

    • getDomainType

      public static Type getDomainType(Expression r)
      Return the domain type of a relation input. Return null if the input is not a relation, i.e. of type POW(S x T) for some sets S and T.
      Parameters:
      r - an relation expression.
      Returns:
      the type of the range of the input relation or null.

    • isPartition

      public static boolean isPartition(Predicate p)

    • equalityRewrite

      public static Predicate equalityRewrite(Predicate pred, Expression from, Expression to)
      Applies the equality rewriter to the given predicate.
      Parameters:
      pred - a predicate to rewrite
      from - the expression that will be replaced
      to - the substitute
      Returns:
      the rewritten predicate
      Since:
      3.0

    • removeWDUnstrictPositions

      public static void removeWDUnstrictPositions(List<IPosition> positions, Predicate predicate)
      Removes all positions in the given list that are not WD strict in the given predicate.
      Parameters:
      positions - a list of positions in the given predicate
      predicate - some predicate
      Since:
      2.0

    • isWDStrictPosition

      public static boolean isWDStrictPosition(Predicate pred, IPosition pos)
      Tells if the formula at the given position in the given predicate is WD strict.
      Parameters:
      pred - some predicate
      pos - a position in the given predicate
      Since:
      2.0

    • equivalenceRewrite

      public static Predicate equivalenceRewrite(Predicate pred, Predicate from, Predicate to)
      Re-write the predicate pred by replacing every occurrence of from by to
      Parameters:
      pred - the re-written predicate
      from - the replaced predicate
      to - the replacing predicate
      Returns:
      the predicate pred re-written
      Since:
      3.0
